title: Odd Lots: How Franchising Led to the Gig Economy (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：特许经营如何导致零工经济（播客）
summary: When the fast food industry began booming in the 1950s, it did so via a new business model known as the franchise. This model allowed independent operators to license trademarks from a business like McDonald’s or Dunkin Donuts, and it soon spread across the country, with huge consequences for how Americans are employed. Legal battles fought by franchises eventually opened the door to what’s now known as the gig economy, allowing Uber drivers to be treated in much the same way as the operator of

title: Khazanah Is Said to Sell $340 Million Tenaga Stake in Placement
title_cn: 据称国库控股将出售 3.4 亿美元的国能配售股份

title: Singapore Pushes Back as US Levies Hit on Forced-Labor Claim

summary: Asia’s best-performing environmental fund has increased exposure to Japan as it expects the nation’s technology sector to prove increasingly pivotal in solving the artificial intelligence industry’s surging power demands.

summary: The value of Alphabet Inc.’s stake in the artificial intelligence startup Anthropic PBC has soared to around $124 billion, making it one of the most lucrative bets in the company’s history.

summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. announced a raft of new products for data centers that it said will outperform those from rival Nvidia Corp., aiming to make gains in a booming market for artificial intelligence computing.

title: China Hits Back at EU With Export Curbs on Rheinmetall, Others
title_cn: 中国对莱茵金属等公司实施出口限制以回击欧盟
summary: China slapped export controls on 14 European companies including German defense giant Rheinmetall AG, saying it acted in retaliation against the European Union’s sanctions on mainland and Hong Kong entities.

title_cn: 中国针对离岸信托进行全面税收限制
summary: China will officially begin taxing offshore trusts established by its citizens, closing a longstanding loophole used by wealthy families for asset protection and succession planning.

title: Turkish Lawmaker Exodus Creates New Opposition Behind Ozgur Ozel

summary: Turkish opposition leader Ozgur Ozel and 90 other lawmakers resigned from the Republican People’s Party, or CHP, on Friday in order to create a new political party to mobilize a fractured opposition.

title_cn: 包括印度人和中国人在内的全球学生的美国梦正在破灭：现场问答
summary: Bloomberg reporters take your questions on how and why the American dream is fading for students globally on Tuesday, July 28, 2026 at 2 p.m. HKT.

title: China Seeks US Clarity on AI Talks as Sanction Threats Loom
title_cn: 制裁威胁迫在眉睫，中国寻求美国就人工智能谈判澄清
summary: Chinese officials are seeking clarity from Washington on what the US expects from upcoming artificial intelligence talks, according to people familiar with the matter, as the Trump administration escalates pressure on China’s fast-rising AI sector.

title: South African High Court Halts Ramaphosa Impeachment Hearing

title_cn: 南非副部长辞去2200亿美元基金职务
summary: South Africa’s deputy finance minister quit as the chairman of a state-owned firm that oversees $220 billion of government pensions, days before he faced being removed from the post.

title: Trump Rebuilds Tariffs With New Levies on 60 Economies
title_cn: 特朗普对 60 个经济体重新征收关税
summary: The US will collect duties of between 10% and 12.5% on imports from most major trading partners, its biggest move yet to reconstruct President Donald Trump’s tariff wall that was struck down by the Supreme Court.

title: CJP Student Protest Tests Modi's Rising India Vision as Youth Seek Jobs
title_cn: CJP 学生抗议考验莫迪在年轻人寻找工作时印度崛起的愿景
summary: The economy is failing to absorb a surging number of young unemployed graduates.

summary: US lawmakers are pressing President Donald Trump’s team to close a loophole they say the administration created in China tech restrictions, but which a key agency denies exists — an example of the persistent confusion surrounding Washington’s efforts to limit China’s AI prowess.

title: Trump Weighs Wider Iranian Attacks With New Truce Still Elusive
title_cn: 特朗普权衡伊朗更广泛的袭击，新的休战协议仍难以实现

summary: The Philippines and China reported their third clash in the South China Sea this week that further heightened tensions, as the US flexed its presence in disputed waters.

title: Cambodia’s Leader Pledges to Tackle Evolving Scam Networks

summary: Bangladesh’s President Mohammed Shahabuddin, a long time ally of ousted Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina, will be resigning on health grounds later on Friday, according to his spokesman.

title: Trump Threatens to Intensify Attacks on Iran as Houthis Join War

summary: President Donald Trump threatened to escalate strikes on Iran and said he’d hold the country responsible for any further attacks by the Yemen-based Houthis on ships in the Red Sea, as the widening Middle East war puts new strain on global energy supplies.

title: UN Chief Candidates Make Case for Restoring World Body’s Stature

title: Bolsonaro Pleads to End Family Feud as Campaign Falters
